data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Data transmitted to and from the site is encrypted using industry-standard protocols.
data.technical_spec: SSL/TLS encryption ensures secure communication over the network.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Implements MFA for enhanced user account security.
data.technical_spec: Integration with Microsoft Authenticator and third-party authentication apps.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Defensive mechanisms in place to mitigate distributed denial of service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Leverages Azure DDoS Protection Standard to safeguard online assets from large-scale attacks.

data.title: Secure Code Practices
data.description: Code is written and reviewed with security best practices to minimize vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Adheres to Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) principles throughout the development process.

data.title: Intrusion Detection Systems
data.description: Advanced systems in place to detect and respond to security threats in real-time.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Azure Security Center for threat detection and analysis.
